title: Google Calendar Integration from another Board creating Items in the wrong Monday Board

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, I have two Boards with Google Calendar Integrations, each connected to a different Google Calendar Account.
But one of my Boards is having Items created in it by the wrong Google Calendar account, even though the Google Calendar Integration in this Board is connected to a completely different Google Calendar account.
Any tips on how to fix this?
Cheers,
Patrick

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @botsquad ,

It seems like there might be some misconfiguration or synchronization issues with the Google Calendar Integrations on your boards.

Try disconnecting the Google Calendar Integration from the board where the items are being created incorrectly. After that reconnect it again .

In some cases, the integration might require reauthorization. Reauthorize the integration for the board that is experiencing the problem.
